title: Technical Application Engineer
description:
Job Description:

A Technical Application Engineer acts as the crucial link between complex technical products/systems and customers, focusing on ensuring successful product integration, usage, and problem-solving through deep technical expertise, client support, customization, training, and collaboration with sales/engineering teams, essentially bridging the gap between what the product does and how a customer uses it to solve their specific needs.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Customer Engagement: Provide pre-sales technical support, demonstrate product capabilities, help with technical aspects of proposals, and offer post-sales troubleshooting and support, often involving on-site visits.
  • Product Expertise: Develop a deep understanding of product specifications, limitations, and functionalities to become a go-to expert.
  • Customization & Integration: Work with clients and internal teams (R&D, engineering, sales) to tailor existing products or systems to meet specific customer requirements.
  • Technical Documentation: Create and maintain user manuals, application notes, FAQs, and technical reports.
  • Training & Enablement: Develop and deliver training for customers, sales teams, and other stakeholders.
  • Testing & Validation: Conduct tests to ensure product performance and reliability.
  • Sales Support: Collaborate closely with sales to present technical solutions and win business.


Core Skills & Qualifications:

  • Strong technical background (Engineering degree often required).
  • Preferably have 2–5 years of experience in a technical, application, or customer-facing engineering role
  • Proficient in English and Mandarin for cross-border communication.
  • Possess good interpersonal skills.
  • Problem-solving and analytical abilities.
  • Ability to understand both business needs and technical details.
  • Experience with relevant software (CAD, programming languages like Python/C++) and industry tools. 

We thank you in advance for your application and will get in touch with you as soon as possible should you be short-listed.

postedCompany.description:
BOSTEX TECHNOLOGIES INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.

Bostex is an industry leader having full ownership of intellectual property in development and manufacturing of access control and security integration systems. With an extensive network in Asia Pacific and International channel partners, we are offering an extensive range of access control system.
